name: TabKan
description: Organize your Chrome tabs and tab groups as a visual Kanban board - with notes, tags, to-dos, saved sessions, and a side panel.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com
